title: Get Activity Goals
description:
Retrieves a user's current daily or weekly activity goals.

It uses units that correspond to the Accept-Language header provided.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

response_fields.name: goals : activeMinutes
response_fields.description: Daily active minutes goal. A value is not returned for weekly goals.

response_fields.name: goals : activeZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: Daily or weekly active zone minutes goal.

response_fields.name: goals : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: Daily calories burned goal. A value is not returned for weekly goals.

response_fields.name: goals : floors
response_fields.description: Daily or weekly floors climbed goal.

response_fields.name: goals : steps
response_fields.description: Daily or weekly steps taken goal.
